creator: mmance@mmance.com
text:
I am using 13.0 and I have built my stuff from ports.  I am experiencing this issue as well. bhyvectl --destroy --vm VMNAME still fixes the problem by removing the file under /dev/vmm.

It happened with a FreeBSD13 guest and a pfSense (also bsd) guest.  I do not recall experiencing this with I used Debian as a guest.
